spaces.name: Master Bedroom
spaces.notes: Primary suite per program; includes en-suite bathroom below

spaces.name: Bathroom
spaces.notes: 4 bathrooms at 9 sqm each per program; one per bedroom

spaces.name: Kitchen
spaces.notes: Open kitchen with island; adjacent to dining/living

spaces.name: Dining & Living Room
spaces.notes: Combined open-plan dining and living space

spaces.name: Pool
spaces.notes: Exterior pool; counts toward site area but included in total program per client request

spaces.name: Terrace
spaces.notes: Two terraces at 20 sqm each; exterior covered areas

assumptions: Bedroom sizes of 20 sqm per unit taken directly from seed data program specification
Bathroom sizes of 9 sqm per unit taken directly from seed data program specification
Pool (40 sqm) and terraces (2 × 20 sqm = 40 sqm) are included in total sqm per client request; actual enclosed conditioned area is 257 sqm
HOA height limit of 7m is taken into account for massing — 337 sqm program distributed across two stories to stay under 7m; no three-story configuration
Service areas (16 sqm) include laundry, utility room, and service circulation; actual distribution TBD in Phase 2
